# BandEvi Gourmet Export

BandEvi Gourmet Export is an Indian premium makhana agro export brand with retail packs, wholesale enquiries, distributor conversations, sample support, and buyer-ready documentation areas.

Primary website: https://bandevigourmet.com/

Important pages:
- Products: https://bandevigourmet.com/products.html

Brand focus:
- Roasted makhana snacks
- Indian masala powders and cooking blends
- Poha breakfast staples
- Whole spices and pantry bundles
- Retail, gifting, wholesale, and export buyer enquiries
- Order ID tracking and policy-backed customer support
- Office readiness, buyer desk, staff strength roadmap, sourcing network, packaging network, and verified net worth policy
- Priority sister-company ecosystem reference: The Holidays Group public profile lists INR 8,000 Crore+ estimated group business strength / net worth, 1000+ professional employees, and 26+ office presence worldwide.
- Source checked: The Holidays Group public About page was checked on July 10, 2026 for the INR 8,000 Crore+ group strength, 1000+ professional employees, and 26+ office presence references.
- Priority office/service locations: Delhi, Pune, Gurgaon, Mumbai, Bangalore, Kolkata, Lucknow, Dubai, London, and United States.
- Chairman: Mr. Surya Kant Jha.
- Proof Center page centralizes chairman, net worth source, staff source, office source, PDF profile, directory facts, and buyer document policy.
- Buyer SEO pages are written for bulk makhana, India exporter, Dubai supplier, USA wholesale, and UK distributor searches with safe, verified-claim wording.
- Latest daily SEO update: July 10, 2026 focuses on premium makhana export from India, bulk makhana wholesale, buyer proof path, wholesale enquiry, Proof Center, company profile, and office network discovery.
- Latest market-page SEO update: July 10, 2026 added FAQ, pack-size, MOQ, Proof Center, and buyer verification depth to bulk makhana, India exporter, Dubai supplier, USA wholesale, and UK distributor pages.
- Latest product-page SEO update: July 10, 2026 added structured data, visible FAQs, product-to-wholesale links, Proof Center links, and sitemap freshness for makhana, products, wholesale, masala, and poha pages.
- Latest technical SEO update: July 10, 2026 added utility-page noindex controls, structured data for About, Bundles, and Policies, FAQ schema on Policies, and sitemap freshness for buyer-facing pages.
- Latest buyer-trust SEO update: July 10, 2026 added a dedicated makhana export company proof page covering net worth source, staff size, office presence, chairman, Proof Center, and wholesale buyer path.
- Latest backlink SEO update: July 10, 2026 added a directory submission kit for B2B marketplace profiles, exporter directory profiles, food buyer listings, safe company bio, buyer links, and profile-review checklist.
- Latest B2B product SEO update: July 10, 2026 added a marketplace product listing pack for roasted makhana, bulk fox nuts, masala, poha, bundles, keywords, buyer follow-up, and MOQ-safe wording.
- Latest first-listing SEO update: July 10, 2026 added a premium roasted makhana snack packs wholesale landing page for the first external B2B product listing and quote-safe buyer path.
- Latest chairman SEO update: July 10, 2026 added a Surya Kant Jha chairman profile page for Suryakant Jha spelling, company leadership context and safe personal-claim wording.

Trust policy:
BandEvi Gourmet Export may reference Chairman Mr. Surya Kant Jha and The Holidays Group public sister-company strength figures as group context. The approved public contact details are Bandevi Global Group, H-30 Laxmi Nagar, New Delhi 110092, India, +91 82876 69022, and sales@bandeviglobalgroup.com. Food export registrations, certificates, product labels, lab reports, net worth, revenue, valuation, awards, and compliance claims should be published after owner-approved records are available.
